speaker: external
text: Hi Daniel this is Lena from Brightline 3PL. We filled out a demo request on your site.

speaker: internal
text: Hey Lena thanks for calling. What pulled you toward us?

speaker: external
text: Our current system is from 2014 and the cycle-count workflow is brutal. We have eight people doing what should be a one-person job.

speaker: internal
text: Yeah that's a really common starting point. How many SKUs are you tracking?

speaker: external
text: About forty thousand active across two facilities. We're growing fast though. We just signed a contract that's going to take us to a third location in Q3.

speaker: internal
text: Got it. I'd love to set up a proper demo with our solutions team. We have customers in your size range who've been able to consolidate that down to one or two cycle counters.

speaker: external
text: Yeah let's do that. What's the price range we're looking at ballpark?

speaker: internal
text: For your scale we're typically looking at around four thousand a month on the Pro tier. We can dig into the exact bundle on the demo.

speaker: external
text: Sounds good. Let's get something on the calendar for next week.

speaker: internal
text: Perfect. I'll send some times over today.
